title: Login issue
description: Customer reports being unable to log in to their account despite entering the correct credentials. The issue started after the last app update.

title: Payment failed
description: User encountered a payment failure during checkout. The card was charged but no confirmation was received. Needs investigation with the payment gateway.

title: Password reset
description: Customer forgot their password and is unable to reset it. The reset link sent via email shows an expired token error.

title: App crash
description: The mobile app crashes immediately after opening the settings page. Customer has tried reinstalling but the issue persists.

title: Incorrect invoice
description: Customer reports that their invoice amount is higher than the order total. The tax calculation appears to be duplicated on the summary page.

title: Feature request
description: User has requested the addition of a dark mode option for better accessibility during nighttime use.

title: Email not received
description: Customer didn’t receive the account confirmation email even after multiple attempts. They’ve checked the spam folder as well.

title: UI glitch on homepage
description: Customer noticed that some buttons overlap text on smaller screens. The issue is affecting mobile users primarily.

title: Shipping delay
description: Order has not been delivered even after the expected delivery date. Customer requests tracking updates and escalation.

title: App running slow
description: Customer complains that the app performance is very slow during login and data sync. Possible server latency issue.

title: Wrong product delivered
description: Customer received an incorrect product variant and has requested a replacement or refund as soon as possible.

title: Subscription renewal issue
description: Customer’s auto-renewal for the premium plan failed due to an unknown billing error. Payment method seems valid.

title: Notification not working
description: Push notifications are not showing up for new messages or updates. The issue started after the last update release.

title: Refund request
description: Customer wants to initiate a refund for a recently canceled order. They mentioned being charged twice for the same transaction.
